scene1_hook: Musk versus Altman goes to TRIAL this week in Oakland! And DeepSeek just dropped V4 to challenge every American AI lab on the planet!
scene2_problem: Tim Cook is OUT. John Ternus is IN as Apple CEO, and the hardware guy is taking over. Cohere just swallowed Aleph Alpha with Lidl money to build a sovereign AI champion. And Sam Altman issued a public apology to Tumbler Ridge, Canada after OpenAI failed to flag a mass shooter to police.
scene3_stakes: Project Maven hit ONE THOUSAND targets in Iran in 24 hours — AI warfare is no longer theoretical. Yann LeCun's AMI Labs raised a BILLION dollars with twelve employees, betting LLMs are a dead end. And Meta keeps poaching Thinking Machines staff — but the talent war flows both ways now.
scene4_solution: DeepSeek V4 launches open-source and claims parity with Anthropic and Google. NVIDIA and Google unveil A5X instances on Vera Rubin NVL72 racks to slash inference costs. And Sony AI's table tennis robot is now BEATING high-level human players.
scene5_ask: Watch the Musk vs Altman trial gavel down Monday in Oakland — this could reshape OpenAI forever. And SusHi Tech Tokyo kicks off as the must-watch event of 2026. This has been your AI Weekly. Same time next Monday.
tagline: This has been your AI Weekly. Same time next Monday.
